---
title: "TempDump"
editor: visual
---

$$
\begin{aligned}
y_t & = \mu_t + \varepsilon_t \hspace{3.57cm} \varepsilon_t \overset{\mathrm{iid}}{\sim} N(0,\sigma^2_\varepsilon) \\
\mu_t &= \mu_{t-1} + \nu_t, \hspace{3.0cm} \nu_t \overset{\mathrm{ind}}{\sim} N \big(0,\exp(h_t)\big) \\
h_t &= \mu + \rho(h_{t-1} - \mu) + \eta_t,\hspace{1cm} \eta_t \overset{\mathrm{iid}}{\sim}Z(\alpha,\beta,0,1)
\end{aligned}
$$

## Local level model - homoscedastic Gaussian evolution

:::::: cols-2
<div>

$$
\begin{aligned}
y_t & = \mu_t + \varepsilon_t \hspace{4.2cm} \varepsilon_t \overset{\mathrm{iid}}{\sim} N(0,\sigma^2_\varepsilon) \\
\mu_t &= \mu_{t-1} + \nu_t, \hspace{3.0cm} \nu_t \overset{\mathrm{iid}}{\sim} N(0,\sigma^2_\nu) \\
\end{aligned}
$$

</div>

<div>

::: iframe-slide
`<iframe width="100%" height="697" frameborder="0" src="https://observablehq.com/embed/b8266f4d5273a4d2?cells=viewof+input%2Cviewof+plotselector%2Cviewof+simulatebutton%2Ctimeplot&amp;banner=false"`{=html}

</iframe>
:::

</div>
::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------
